overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game depicting a slow, tense walk through a foggy, dilapidated bayou settlement at night. The player navigates weathered wooden boardwalks past abandoned shacks and approaches a houseboat with firelight, creating an ominous atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated wooden boardwalk toward a dilapidated house

entered.detail: two-story dilapidated wooden structure with peeling paint and broken windows
weathered wooden planks forming the walking path
abandoned vehicle parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a narrow wooden boardwalk. A weathered wooden house looms on the left while an abandoned rusted truck sits ahead on the right. The camera moves forward steadily through the confined passage.

events.description: passing a window with warm orange light visible inside the otherwise dark building

agents.ego_description: navigating around the left side of the building, hugging the exterior wall

entered.detail: window with metal bars showing warm interior light
old wooden barrel sitting on the walkway
decayed wagon wheel leaning against the building
rotting tree stump visible as the path opens

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to circumnavigate the building, passing close to a barred window emitting warm light. A wooden barrel and wagon wheel sit on the right side of the narrow path before the view opens toward the waterfront revealing a distant houseboat with firelight.

events.description: approaching the houseboat with visible fire and a silhouetted figure on deck

agents.ego_description: walking down the dock toward the illuminated houseboat, observing the surroundings carefully

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing on the deck of the houseboat near the fire

entered.detail: floating structure with bright fire burning on the upper deck
extended wooden pier leading over the water
vertical wooden pilings sticking out of the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide waterfront dock shrouded in thick fog. A houseboat illuminated by firelight sits ahead on the water, with a silhouetted figure visible on its deck. The camera approaches the boat along the wooden dock, then passes by it revealing open water and submerged debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairs leading to upper settlement

events.description: turning around and beginning ascent up wooden stairs away from the water
approaching building with porch light and parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: turning back from the waterfront and climbing wooden stairs toward a lit building

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the building entrance beside a motorcycle

entered.detail: steep weathered wooden stairs with railings leading upward
moss-covered stone wall alongside the stairs
building with illuminated porch light at the top of the stairs
parked motorcycle near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the water and ascends weathered wooden stairs flanked by stone retaining walls. At the top, a building with a warm porch light comes into view, with a motorcycle parked nearby and a figure standing near the entrance as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic bayou settlement that gradually opens onto a wide waterfront before ascending toward a lit residence. It begins on a narrow wooden boardwalk under a foggy night sky, moving steadily past a weathered house and a rusted truck. As the camera turns to circumnavigate the building, it passes a barred window emitting warm light and rustic debris before the view expands toward a distant houseboat glowing with firelight. The scene then opens onto a wide, fog-shrouded dock where the camera approaches the illuminated boat and a silhouetted figure, eventually passing by to reveal open water and submerged debris. Finally, the camera turns away from the shore to ascend weathered wooden stairs flanked by stone walls, arriving at a building with a warm porch light where a motorcycle is parked and a figure stands near the entrance.
